records.ety: [OE. us, AS. <?/s; akin to OFries. & OS. <?/s, D. ons, G. uns, Icel. & Sw. oss, Dan. os, Goth. uns, L. nos we, us, Gr. <?/ we, Skr. nas us. <?/<?/<?/<?/. Cf. Nostrum, Our.]

defs: The persons speaking, regarded as an object; ourselves; -- the objective case of we. See We.
quotes: Give us this day our daily bread.
